summary: Frontend-only test of Quick Add dialog on Parent Dashboard > Chores & Rewards. All 5 requested scenarios PASS: (1) Button renamed to 'Quick Add' and shows all 3 tabs (reward/penalty/chore); (2) Reward tab submission works -> toast 'Reward applied!', dialog closes, Rewards count increments to 1; (3) Chore tab creates chore -> toast 'Chore created!', dialog closes, 'TEST Quick Add Chore' appears in Active Chores list (Demo Kid, +Rs15, once); (4) Child selection persists when switching Reward -> Chore tab (Demo Kid retained); (5) parent-dashboard testid renders (count=1) without runtime errors.

issues: Radix warning: `DialogContent` requires a `DialogTitle` for accessibility. Add a (optionally VisuallyHidden) DialogTitle to the Quick Add dialog.
React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in ParentDashboard render method (pre-existing, not introduced by this change but worth cleaning up).

action_items: Optional: add a DialogTitle (VisuallyHidden if not visually needed) inside the Quick Add DialogContent to silence the a11y warning.
Optional: fix duplicate/missing `key` prop in a mapped list within ParentDashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: Quick Add feature implemented correctly; reward/penalty and chore flows both close the dialog and refresh the list.
ParentDashboard.jsx is large (>2700 lines). Consider splitting the dialog blocks into sub-components for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: Created one chore 'TEST Quick Add Chore' (Rs15, once) and one reward 'TEST Reward Reason' (Rs7) for Demo Kid via Quick Add dialog.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Add dialog verified end-to-end. Test-created records ('TEST Quick Add Chore', 'TEST Reward Reason') remain in wallet_demo_parent's account.
